description.en: Unity developer since 2016. A fan of stories in all their forms. Rumor says he doesn't sleep...
description.es: Desarrollador Unity desde 2016. Fanático de las historias en todas sus formas. Dicen que no duerme...

favorites.en: Xenoblade Chronicles, Cave Story, Metroid Prime, Eternal Darkness, YARG
favorites.es: Xenoblade Chronicles, Cave Story, Metroid Prime, Eternal Darkness, YARG

description.en: A bored music teacher looking for the secret melody to open a portal and escape to another dimension.
description.es: Un profe de música aburrido en busca de la melodía secreta para abrir un portal y escapar a otra dimensión.

favorites.en: Age of Empires II, The Settlers, Donkey Kong series
favorites.es: Age of Empires II, The Settlers, Donkey Kong saga

description.en: Artist conjuring ideas with colors and shapes since time immemorial.
description.es: Artista invocando ideas con colores y formas desde tiempos inmemoriales.

favorites.en: The Legend of Zelda series, Omori, Project Sekai
favorites.es: The Legend of Zelda saga, Omori, Project Sekai

description.en: A developer who masters the ancient art of conjuring game mechanics that give life to the inanimate.
description.es: Un desarrollador que domina el arte antiguo de conjurar mecánicas de juego que dan vida a lo inerte.

favorites.en: Hollow Knight, Terranigma, The Binding of Isaac: Rebirth
favorites.es: Hollow Knight, Terranigma, The Binding of Isaac: Rebirth

description.en: A 2D/3D apprentice who transforms ideas into motion, bringing characters and their stories to life.
description.es: Aprendiz del mundo 2d/3d que transforma ideas en movimiento dando vida a personajes y sus historias.

description.en: A traditional developer creating and destroying worlds to change the pace.
description.es: Un desarrollador tradicional creando y destruyendo mundos para cambiar de ritmo.

favorites.en: The Legend of Zelda series, Assassin's Creed series, NFS & Burnout series, Jak and Daxter, Ratchet & Clank
favorites.es: The Legend of Zelda saga, Assassin's Creed saga, NFS & Burnout Series, Jak and Daxter saga, Ratchet & Clank saga

description.en: Eternal apprentice of the dark art of deployments, he's been seen coding or designing. They say he plays more for the OSTs than anything else.
description.es: Eterno aprendiz del oscuro arte de los despliegues, se le ha visto programando o diseñando. Dicen que juega más por los OST que por otra cosa

favorites.en: Persona 3, Deltarune, Kenshi, Megaman X saga
favorites.es: Persona 3, Deltarune, Kenshi, saga Megaman X

description.en: 'I became a developer to play video games during work hours'
description.es: 'Me hice desarrollador para jugar videojuegos en horario laboral'

favorites.en: Tony Hawk's Pro Skater 2, Clone Hero, Super Mario 64, Super Meat Boy
favorites.es: Tony Hawk's Pro Skater 2, Clone Hero, Super Mario 64, Super Meat Boy

description.en: Specialist in creating 2D and 3D assets with more color than a Mario Party game
description.es: Especialista en crear assets 2D y 3D con más color que una partida de Mario Party

favorites.en: Mario Party 3, Vampire Savior: The Lord of the Vampire (Darkstalkers 3), Mario Kart Double Dash, The King of Fighter's saga, Sengoku Basara Saga
favorites.es: Mario Party 3, Vampire Savior: The Lord of the Vampire (Darkstalkers 3), Mario Kart Double Dash,Saga The King of Fighter, Saga Sengoku Basara

description.en: Life only has the meaning you give it.
description.es: La vida solo tiene el sentido que tu le des.

favorites.en: Skyrim, World of Warcraft, Killing Floor
favorites.es: Skyrim, World of Warcraft, Killing Floor
